title: Expanding the clinical use of DBS: through a metabolomic and a lipidomic evaluation_Mat&Meth
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cltna","text":"WARNING : this protocols is connect to the corresponding research paper about DBS and serum.","type":"align-center","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":92}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"21hn0","text":"","type":"align-center","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fg98m","text":"The only authors described here are the one which have developped or carry out the analysis.","type":"align-center","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":92}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3apc7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"22g71","text":"In this protocole, multiple analysis are described to quantify metabolites and lipids \u0026 screening of metabolome and lipidome of serum and DBS. For every analysis, the whole process is described, from the extraction to the data analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eijhq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6qmva","text":"If some information are missing, please report to the corresponding research paper, in the Mat\u0026Meth section or in the supplementary data.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3tsof","text":"Metabolomics is the  “omics” science studying metabolites and can meet the need for a deeper insight into biological data. It offers a real-time snapshot of a metabolic state and so reflect immediate physiological changes.\nBy revealing metabolic profiles, metabolomics allows for precise diagnosis, tailored treatments, and proactive health management, ensuring highly personalized and effective interventions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c3eut","text":"(Nordström, A., Lewensohn, R. Metabolomics: Moving to the Clinic. J Neuroimmune Pharmacol 5, 4–17 (2010). https://doi.org/10.1007/s11481-009-9156-4 )\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":149},{"style":"bold","offset":90,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ihnj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"7pfd8","text":"Dried Blood Spot (DBS) represent the whole blank blotter paper with several blood soaked spots : only these spots aree interesting so it is mendatory to retrieve them as 3 mm diameter disc called a punch, with specific equipment : a puncher (available in mostly all hospitals)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"74mc6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"apojt","text":"If you are going to do some comparison between DBS and other blood sample, try to have all you sample from same patient(s)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"74fb4","text":"Be really carefull with DBS handling (no contact with skin, don't breath on it) and storage (humidity, UV exposition, temperature and long-time storage).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
